task: Advanced task: Given an embedded omics packet with sample QC metrics, apply the provided QC rules and produce a ranked CSV of protein variant stability. Include all intermediate calculations, explicit assumptions, exceptions, exact row/value citations pointing to the embedded packet, validation checks, uncertainty/sensitivity notes, and a final decision table that ties each recommendation to the supplied values. Do not invent additional records; mark any missing inputs as needs_review. The response must be executable from the embedded packet alone (no external data lookup beyond understanding the cited public-removed context).
